modules.title: Thermodynamics
modules.content: C, Cp: definition and relation; adiabatic changes; reversible and irreversible processes; first law applications; exothermic and endothermic processes; Hess's law; Kirchoff's law; second law of thermodynamics; Joule-Thomson effect; entropy evaluation; Gibbs free energy; spontaneity and equilibrium.

modules.title: Atoms and Molecules
modules.content: Homonuclear and heteronuclear diatomics, covalent and ionic bonds, electronegativity, hybridization, molecular shapes, non-covalent interactions (Vander Waals, hydrogen bonding).

modules.title: Solid State Chemistry
modules.content: Stoichiometric and non-stoichiometric defects; semiconductors; preparation of microminiaturized semiconductor devices; integrated circuits.

modules.title: Instrumental Methods of Analysis
modules.content: Introduction to IR, UV-Vis, NMR and Mass spectrometry.

modules.title: Reaction Dynamics
modules.content: Reaction laws, rate and order, molecularity; first and second order kinetics; Arrhenius equation; transition state theory.

modules.title: Transition and Metal Chemistry
modules.content: Coordination compounds with CN=6; ligands; geometrical and optical isomerism; ionization, linkage and coordination isomerism.

modules.title: Organic Molecules
modules.content: Inductive effect, resonance, hyperconjugation, electromeric effect, carbanions and free radicals; addition, elimination and substitution reactions.

modules.title: Polymerization
modules.content: Concepts, classifications, polymerization processes; common polymers: PE, PP, PVC, Bakelite, natural rubber, SBR, NBR, nylon 6,6, polyester; conducting polymers.

modules.title: Industrial Chemistry
modules.content: Fuels: solid, liquid, gaseous; coal analysis; petroleum and derivatives; octane/cetane numbers; natural gas, water gas.

modules.title: Electrochemistry
modules.content: Electrolytic conductance, specific and equivalent conductance, molar conductance.
